column1: If you (to be) busy, I (to leave) you alone.
If my friend (to come) to see me, I (to be) very glad.
If mother (to buy) a cake, we (to have) a very nice tea party.
If he (to send) an e-mail, we (not to worry).
If you (not to work) systematically, you (to fail) the exam.
If I (to get) a ticket, I (to go) to the cinema.
If you (to freeze) water, it (to turn) into ice.
If they (to come) to the party, they (to bring) a present.

If I (to work) too much, I (to get) tired.
